channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Key matchup of Texans-Chargers playoff game: Will Anderson Jr., Danielle Hunter against tackles Rashawn Slater, Joe Alt
item.description: Texans defense against Chargers offense is the key matchup for Saturday's AFC wild-card round playoff game
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lindsey Vonn impresses skiing into 6th place in her first World Cup downhill race since 2019
item.description: ST ANTON, Austria (AP) — Six years later it's “Wow, Lindsey, wow!” The racecourse commentator broadcasting Lindsey Vonn's first World Cup downhill race since 2019 — the American is age 40 and has a titanium knee — summed up how impressive the ski great's performance was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants legend Victor Cruz talks state of team after it retained coach, general manager despite abysmal season
item.description: The New York Giants face maybe the most important offseason in a generation, and Victor Cruz suggested what they should do in the next few months.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hayton scores dramatic goal in 2-1 win over San Jose
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Barrett Hayton scored with 1:32 remaining in regulation to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 win against the San Jose Sharks at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Bill McCartney, who coached Colorado to its only football national championship in 1990, has died. He was 84. The charismatic figure known as Coach Mac died Friday night “after a courageous journey with dementia,” according to a family statement.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get ready for the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: When does the Australian Open start? The time in Melbourne
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State, Notre Dame to meet for title, long after upset losses
item.description: Two upset losses stood out among the rest in college football this season. Notre Dame suffered one of them. Ohio State the other. In years past, those losses might have been enough to knock both teams out of the hunt for a national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Fishburn and Denny McCarthy share Sony Open lead
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Patrick Fishburn found some early momentum and Denny McCarthy overcame a sluggish start Friday, both winding up in the same spot — a share of the lead in the Sony Open going into what figures to be a wide-open weekend at Waialae.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Another rough night for UCLA coach Mick Cronin: This time his ire was directed at the officials
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Three days after ripping his team following a home loss to Michigan, UCLA coach Mick Cronin turned his disdain toward the officials.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: The Buckeyes (13-2) posted the semifinal victory in the same stadium where 10 years ago they were champions when the College Football Playoff debuted with a four-team format.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Red Wings hold off Blackhawks 5-3 for 6th straight victory
item.description: Alex DeBrincat and Lucas Raymond each had a goal and an assist and the Detroit Red Wings won their sixth straight game, beating the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rose Bowl half-marathon and 5K postponed due to wildfires
item.description: The annual Rose Bowl half-marathon and 5K, originally scheduled for Jan. 19, has been postponed as wildfires continue to ravage the Los Angeles area.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Red Sox manager Alex Cora says he skipped Trump White House visit to show support for Puerto Rico
item.description: Boston Red Sox manager Alex Cora recently opened up on why he skipped a trip to the Trump White House after leading his team to the 2018 World Series title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former WWE CEO Vince McMahon, Securities and Exchange Commission reach settlement after lengthy probe
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission said it reached a settlement agreement with WWE co-founder Vince McMahon, which requires he pay a civil penalty and reimburse the WWE $1.33 million following a yearslong probe over administrative charges.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers head coach JJ Redick emotional while opening up on 'awful feeling' of losing home in wildfires
item.description: An emotional JJ Redick opened up about losing his home in the Palisades wildfires and explained to the media what he saw driving in his neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NASCAR issues rule changes regarding waivers, damaged vehicles, and an open spot for elite drivers
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Hello Helio and welcome to the Daytona 500. Four-time Indianapolis 500 winner Helio Castroneves claimed a spot in the season-opening Daytona 500 as part of a slew of rule changes NASCAR announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles QB Jalen Hurts clears concussion protocol and will start wild-card game against Green Bay
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Out of NFL concussion protocol, Jalen Hurts is ready to roll for the Eagles. With Hurts cleared, the NFC East champion Eagles (14-3) are close to full strength in the starting lineup for their NFC wild-card game Sunday against Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Jalen Hurts says he doesn't remember concussion sideline incident, amid bad year for brain injuries
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts told reporters on Friday that he doesn't remember what happened after he suffered the concussion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Expect road closures in Santee for 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships
item.description: The City of Santee is hosting the 2025 USATF National Race Walk Championships this weekend, and several road closures will be in place Sunday morning into the early afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Former Georgia quarterback Carson Beck says he has committed to Miami for 2025 season
item.description: CORAL GABLES, Fla. (AP) — Carson Beck is heading to Miami. Beck, the now-former Georgia quarterback, has pushed his NFL plans back a year and is committed to play next season at Miami, making the announcement known Friday and becoming another huge transfer portal acquisition for the Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Latest NFL season highlights financial risks for sports betting companies when so many favorites win
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It’s been a tough football season for sports books. FanDuel and its key rival DraftKings have both showed investors that the house can indeed lose, or at least lose more than anticipated.
item.dc:creator: DAMIAN J. TROISE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jordan Spieth sees his wrist surgery as a chance to reset. He plans to return at Pebble Beach
item.description: Jordan Spieth has been playing golf for a month without pain and plans to return from wrist surgery at the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am, ending his longest stretch without competition and looking at his time off as a chance to reset.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs Bonus: Tampa Bay looking for similar results in Wild Card rematch against Washington
item.description: With the Buccaneers gearing up for their fifth straight Post Season run, Barber joins a special episode of Bucs Bonus to talk about what the team needs to do to contain rookie quarterback phenom Jayden Daniels and the Washington Commanders offense that has leveled up since the two teams met in week
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NFL moves Vikings-Rams playoff game to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL has moved the Rams' wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in the Los Angeles area. The game will be played Monday night at State Farm Stadium, the home of the Arizona Cardinals, in suburban Glendale.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Here's how much it will cost to (possibly) see Messi play in San Jose
item.description: (KRON) -- Tickets for the San Jose Earthquakes' home match against Inter Miami went on sale Thursday. The match offers a potential chance for Bay Area soccer fans to see Miami and Argentina star Lionel Messi in action.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC loses to Stanley Cup champs, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club continues to struggle at home, losing its fourth straight game at the Delta Center Wednesday night to the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Canyon Hills 47, Crawford 39
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball on Tuesday night at Crawford with the Colts hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers win a very competitive defensive battle 47-39.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Former Baltimore Orioles left-hander Brian Matusz, who made final MLB appearance with Cubs in 2016, dies at 37
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Brian Matusz, the left-handed pitcher who spent eight seasons in the major leagues and made his final big-league appearance with the Cubs during their 2016 World Series championship season, has died. He was 37. Matusz, a former No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Peter Seidler's brother responds to lawsuit over control of Padres
item.description: Matt Seidler, the brother of late Padres owner Peter Seidler, has responded to the lawsuit filed by Peter Seidler's widow over control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: CMU Women's wrestler Marissa Gallegos reflects on wrestling journey
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Marissa Gallegos is no stranger to the spotlight. The Colorado Mesa University star has cemented her legacy as the winningest women’s wrestler in program history. Her career, defined by grit, dominance, and determination, has inspired athletes across the sport.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Peter Seidler's widow takes legal action in fight for control over the Padres
item.description: The widow of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler filed a legal complaint Monday against two of his brothers in a fight over who should control the Major League Baseball team.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NFL playoffs: Lions beat Vikings to secure NFC's No. 1 seed, finalize postseason field
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The final position in the NFL postseason field was settled in the final game of the regular season. The Detroit Lions earned their week off.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: About four hours after the Colts completed their season with a 26-23 overtime victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars, Irsay ended any speculation about possible offseason changes by announcing in a letter to fans that longtime general manager Chris Ballard and second-year coach Shane Steichen would r
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs finally depart KC for Denver amid ice storm after 4 hours spent waiting on the tarmac
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Chiefs finally departed from Kansas City International Airport for their game in Denver on Saturday after spending about four hours stranded on the tarmac amid an ice storm that blanketed the region ahead of an impending blizzard.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5
